MARIADB_VERSION.description: Specific version of mariadb to install. Can be a numeric version or an alias.

MARIADB_INSTALL_METHOD.description: How to install MARIADB. 'system' uses the native OS package manager, 'source' compiles/downloads binaries.

LIBSCRIPT_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Global unix socket to listen on

MARIADB_LISTEN_PORT.description: Port for MARIADB to listen on

MARIADB_LISTEN_ADDRESS.description: Address for MARIADB to listen on

MARIADB_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Unix socket for MARIADB to listen on

MARIADB_SERVICE_RUN_AS_USER.description: Windows local user account to run the service (leave empty for Network Service)

MARIADB_SERVICE_RUN_AS_PASSWORD.description: Password for the local user account (if applicable)

MARIADB_SERVICE_NAME.description: Custom name for the Windows Service (allows side-by-side installations)
